```{r,vars}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| output: false


#print("vvars qmd run...")
tdf<-read.csv("qa.csv")
# m2<-grep("(elancholi)",tdf$t)
# m1<-grep("(.evolution)",tdf$t)
#m1<-1:length(tdf$t)

params<-list(tables=list(tbl_qa1=list(file="qa.qmd",num=1),tbl_qa2=list(file="qa.qmd",num=2)))
tblcap1<-paste0("Table ",params$tables$tbl_qa1$num,", BSI: annotations")
tblcap2<-paste0("Table ",params$tables$tbl_qa2$num,", Yakura, LLM influence: annotations")
#load("../lm-base_lmdf.c.RData")
#source("../LLM-poster.R")
load("plist3.RData")
```
